name: com.ezg.pooling
description: Game-agnostic GameObject pooling for Unity. Spawn/despawn pooled prefabs by reference or by resource path, with generic component pools, delayed despawn, and a static PoolService facade. Self-contained: vendors its own MonoBehaviour singleton and resolves prefabs through Resources by default (override PoolResources.Loader to route through AssetBundles/Addressables). Requires UniTask for delayed despawn.
